mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hp_daily_visits (visit_date, page, visit_count) VALUES (#{date}, #{page}, 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE visit_count = visit_count + 1
mapper.select: SELECT visit_count FROM hp_daily_visits WHERE page = 'lobby' AND visit_date = #{date}
SELECT sum(visit_count) FROM hp_daily_visits WHERE page = 'lobby'
